# Naming Convention Guidelines
This document outlines the naming conventions to be followed in this project to ensure consistency and clarity.
## General Principles
- Use clear and descriptive names that convey the purpose of the variable, function, class, or file.
- Avoid abbreviations unless they are widely recognized.
- Be consistent with naming conventions throughout the project. 
- Use English for all names to maintain uniformity.
